title: 10 best herbal tinctures for swollen gums
description: Licorice tinctures helps with swollen gums because they contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce swelling and soothe gum tissue. The tannins and flavonoids present in licorice root have potent antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which help to combat inflammation caused by bacteria, plaque, and other factors. By reducing inflammation, herbal licorice tinctures can alleviate pain, discomfort, and redness associated with swollen gums, promoting a healthy and comfortable oral ...
